channel.title: Job on AboutMe
channel.description: Recent content in Job on AboutMe

item.title: My_first_job
item.description:
My first job as a Syterm Engineer

I landed my first intern as a System Engineer at CMC Cloud

Before that, i have never applied to a tech job ever before due to my low confidence and struggle to think that i’m able to fit in this big tech

I always think i was not good enough

Then just at the lowest time of my life, Stoicism came to me
